scripting.description: Deterministic file creation for sprints. (Excluded semantic tasks: review, judgment).
Standardize 'Phase 1' output formatting across all skills to ensure audit consistency.

hooks.issue: Unconditional execution adds 3-5s of latency to session exits.
hooks.recommendation: Use conditional: `if git diff --name-only | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx tsc --noEmit; fi`.

hooks.issue: Redundant dependency checks on session start.

memory.reason: Zeros out the description-context tax for manually-invoked commands.

memory.action: Ensure tables point to correct /slash-commands and docs/ filenames.
memory.reason: Earned Context: Essential for correct tool and path discovery.
